description: Panel discussion on building secure smart contract infrastructure with open protocols in the DeFi space, featuring insights from Sergey of One Inch, Felix from ARPA, and Calvin from Compound.
topic_summary: The panel covers the evolution of DeFi, liquidity aggregation, and the importance of composability in decentralized finance. Sergey discusses One Inch's role in solving liquidity issues [t=255.57], Felix explains ARPA's privacy-preserving computation network [t=127.39], and Calvin outlines Compound's transition to a decentralized governance model [t=238.07].
